emails.subject: URGENT: Production database is down — all services affected
emails.body: Alert: The primary PostgreSQL cluster went offline at 08:47 UTC. All customer-facing APIs are returning 503. The on-call DBA has been paged but has not responded. Immediate engineering intervention is required to restore service.

emails.subject: Q4 Sales Report — Final Numbers
emails.body: Hi team, attached is the final Q4 sales report. We exceeded target by 12%. Key highlights: Enterprise segment grew 23%, SMB held steady. Please review before the board meeting on Thursday. No immediate action needed — just wanted everyone aligned on the numbers.

emails.subject: Congratulations! You've won a $500 Amazon Gift Card!!!
emails.body: CONGRATULATIONS!!! You have been selected as today's lucky winner! Click here immediately to claim your $500 Amazon Gift Card. This offer expires in 24 hours! Act NOW or lose your prize forever! No purchase necessary. Click: http://totally-legit-prizes.xyz/claim

emails.subject: Re: Customer onboarding flow — design feedback
emails.body: Thanks for the mockups, Lisa. The new onboarding wizard looks great. Two small suggestions: 1) Move the 'Skip Tutorial' button to the top-right corner so power users can bypass quickly. 2) Consider adding a progress bar. Otherwise, approved to move to development. Nice work!

emails.subject: Meeting notes: Engineering standup Jan 15
emails.body:
Automated standup summary for January 15:
- Backend team: API migration 80% complete, targeting Wednesday finish
- Frontend team: Dashboard redesign in QA, 3 minor bugs remaining
- DevOps: Kubernetes upgrade scheduled for Saturday maintenance window
- No blockers reported

Next standup: January 16, 9:00 AM PST

emails.subject: URGENT: Key client threatening to churn — needs executive call
emails.body: Flagging this as critical. Acme Corp ($2.4M ARR) has filed 3 support tickets this week about API latency. Their VP of Engineering just called me directly and said they are evaluating competitors. I need an executive sponsor to join a call with them this afternoon. This cannot wait until next week.

emails.subject: Updated PTO Policy — effective February 1
emails.body: Hi everyone, please review the updated PTO policy attached. Key changes: unlimited PTO is being replaced with a structured 25-day annual allowance. Rollover rules and blackout dates are outlined in the document. Please acknowledge receipt by January 25. Questions can be directed to your HR business partner.

emails.subject: Invitation: Company All-Hands — January 22
emails.body:
You're invited to the monthly All-Hands meeting.

Date: January 22, 2024
Time: 2:00 PM - 3:30 PM PST
Location: Main Auditorium / Zoom link below

Agenda:
1. CEO update on company strategy
2. Product roadmap preview
3. Q4 wins celebration
4. Q&A session

Please RSVP by January 19.

emails.subject: Re: Bug #4521 — Login page crashes on Safari 16
emails.body:
Bug #4521 has been updated.

Status: Open → In Progress
Assignee: Carlos Mendez
Priority: High
Affected users: ~2,400 (Safari 16 on macOS Ventura)

Carlos noted: 'Root cause identified — WebKit regression with our auth SDK. Fix is straightforward, PR incoming today. Should be in tomorrow's release.'

emails.subject: Unsubscribe confirmation: TechDigest Weekly
emails.body: You have been successfully unsubscribed from TechDigest Weekly. You will no longer receive our newsletter. If this was a mistake, you can re-subscribe at any time by visiting our website. Thank you for being a reader!

email_001.response_hint: Acknowledge the outage and confirm engineering is investigating immediately.

email_002.response_hint: Thank Sarah and confirm you will review before Thursday.

email_004.response_hint: Acknowledge the design feedback and confirm next steps.

email_006.response_hint: Escalate to an executive sponsor and schedule an afternoon call with Acme Corp.

email_007.response_hint: Acknowledge the policy update and plan to review by the deadline.

email_009.response_hint: Note that Carlos is handling the fix; no action needed.
